_comment: Configuration for scripts/15_arxiv_watch.py. Each entry defines a topic-scoped arXiv query; new papers matching the query trigger a SCOOP_WATCH alert. Edit relevance_keywords to tune precision; remove a topic by deleting its entry.

queries.title: Position-bias quantification across judge models
queries.arxiv_query: abs:"position bias" AND (abs:"LLM judge" OR abs:"language model judge" OR abs:"LLM-as-a-judge")
queries.rationale: Bridge paper. Any new paper with a quantification + released harness is a hard scoop signal (KILL_CRITERIA K1).

queries.title: Judge robustness to candidate-side prompt injection
queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"prompt injection" OR abs:"adversarial prompt") AND (abs:"LLM judge" OR abs:"evaluator" OR abs:"LLM-as-a-judge" OR abs:"reward model")
queries.rationale: Long-term paper. The 'Red Teaming the Mind of the Machine' arXiv 2025 paper is the known blocker.

queries.title: Cross-judge agreement on long-context QA
queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"inter-judge" OR abs:"cross-judge" OR abs:"judge agreement") AND (abs:"long context" OR abs:"long-context")

queries.title: Synthetic data quality evaluation metrics
queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"synthetic data") AND (abs:"quality evaluation" OR abs:"fidelity" OR abs:"evaluation framework")
queries.rationale: Second-tier candidate. Watch monthly, not weekly.

queries.title: Competing comprehensive surveys on LLM-as-Judge
queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"survey" OR abs:"systematic review" OR abs:"comprehensive review") AND (abs:"LLM-as-a-judge" OR abs:"LLM judge" OR abs:"language model judge" OR abs:"automatic evaluator")
queries.rationale: Primary high-citation paper is the LLM-as-Judge survey. A competing survey at TMLR/JMLR/ACM CS is K1 in SURVEY_llm_judge/KILL_CRITERIA.md.

queries.title: General LLM evaluation surveys (adjacency check)
queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"survey" OR abs:"comprehensive review") AND abs:"LLM evaluation" AND (abs:"benchmark" OR abs:"metric" OR abs:"evaluator")
queries.rationale: Even an adjacent survey could absorb cite share. Watch but lower urgency.
